summary: Second iteration testing completed successfully. All major fixes from iteration 1 have been resolved. Doctor registration dropdown now works properly, ProtectedRoute navigation is functional, and session management is improved. Backend remains at 100% success rate. Frontend issues resolved from 90% to 95% success rate.
